subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-10-01 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: If this were the College of Bahá, it would be well indeed. Complete and perfected disciples would issue forth therefrom. Now such is our hope [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر این کلیه ، کلیهٴ بهائیه بود خوب بود.  تلامذهٴ مکملی از آن بیرون می آمدند.  حالا امیدمان چنان است
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @education of children; moral education
